description: §23.2/§23.6 E-FOREIGN-003 — a library file (`export fn`s, NO `<program>`) with a bound inline value-returning `_={ 1 + 1 }=` foreign block but NO `<foreign lang=… />` declaration and no ancestor `<program lang=>` either. The admitted (value-returning) block has no `lang=` to resolve in any ancestor, so it fires E-FOREIGN-003 (type-system.ts checkForeignBlocks) per §23.2/§23.6.
